info.title: a2a-router Bridge API
info.description: Public HTTPS-only A2A/MCP bridge MVP for a2a-router. Authenticated registry, streaming transport, and settlement are planned but not live.

contact.name: a2a-router
contact.x-direct-contact: X DM preferred; no public email is published.

x-contributions.note: Financial contributions do not affect Trust-Pledge audit status, bridge routing, or future listing decisions.

tags.name: discovery
tags.description: Machine-readable agent, MCP, DID, and Trust-Pledge metadata

tags.name: bridge
tags.description: Cross-protocol A2A and MCP bridge calls

get.summary: Get the public A2A Agent Card

200.description: Self-attested Trust-Pledge with detached JWS signature
JWKS for Trust-Pledge and Agent Card signatures

post.summary: Call the MCP Streamable HTTP bridge endpoint
post.description: Supports initialize, tools/list, and tools/call for a2a_router.status, a2a_router.trust_pledge, a2a_router.call_a2a_agent, a2a_router.list_mcp_tools, and a2a_router.call_mcp_tool.

post.summary: Call the A2A JSON-RPC bridge endpoint
post.description: Supports project status responses and structured SendMessage bridge calls to public HTTPS MCP or A2A targets.
